intro: Whether you're just starting out or pushing toward your next rating milestone, personalized 1-on-1 coaching accelerates your progress faster than any book or course.

packages.title: Single Session
packages.description: One 60-minute coaching session. Great for a specific opening, endgame question, or game analysis.

packages.title: Starter Pack
packages.description: Three 60-minute sessions. Build on each lesson with continuity and a tailored study plan.

packages.title: Monthly Training
packages.description: Six sessions per month with ongoing game review, custom puzzles, and direct feedback between sessions.
